title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills · Protocol Clinic: Plugin Package
summary: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext plugin package increment in a distributable skill plugin. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.
Inspect source, scripts, dependencies, and permissions before installing a skill.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Plugin Package evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-plugin-package-19rj0r: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Plugin Package into observable performance evidence.

agent-ext-plugin-package-19rj0r:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
